nt":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6158,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6158,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":13615},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6900769628788621325","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，确实还不错，耐下性子看完前面一点，其实就能发现是一本不错的书，至于男主圣母，看见女的走不动道，我个人没有怎么发现，这是我看的又一本没有掺杂修仙，玄幻，奇幻等等系统文，文字流畅，情节较为圆满，只是到最后感觉少了点什么，总体来说观感不错，可读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1606710638,"group_id":"6825865883009682443","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每看完一本书都会发书评，欢迎借鉴。欢迎给我推荐书（不恰烂钱）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwedu73yL84rNuynnEpXQ3x5cdG24yy3jliC6xm0nGKj","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/b50e23814cae4b8081d66c3e294a49c0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776792716\u0026x-signature=7DQcYxY003cjkQwH0OiORSPNsoA%3D","user_id":"1363029331299501","user_name":"刺客陆柒捌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1363029331299501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6825865883009682443","book_info":{"abstract":"“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励皇朝集团股权15%！”“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励7000万超跑一辆！”“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励6.8亿别墅一座！”“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励持续增值中商业街一条！”国际财经专栏约访：请问叶先生，以你如此雄厚的资产，为什么还要去送外卖，是在体验生活吗？叶天南：“勤劳才能致富！”国际财经专栏：说的好有道理，我竟无言以对！观众：叶天南都这么勤奋，我有什么理由偷懒？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/3b59e31402a1b82fdf82d0b869676b91","author":"东土唐长老","author_id":"","book_id":"6825865883009682443","book_name":"硬核奖励系统","book_short_name":"我开超跑送外卖怎么了","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_ty user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6864077136404774919","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哎呀，这部小说好看死了，主角真特喵厉害，刚认识个女人，就一直舔。啊，注意了，这不是明舔，这就是传说中的暗舔，假装不在意，实则不抵抗，半推半就的就到了，竟然没有毒死我，让我万毒王情何以堪？真是一部好书，祝大家都跟主角一样，舔狗舔到最后应有尽有。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1598167503,"group_id":"6825865883009682443","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只写字，一二三四五六…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzcbhQWMSuowLuop0fp9f9Y=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"883651261237316","user_name":"木易君王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"883651261237316","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6825865883009682443","book_info":{"abstract":"“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励皇朝集团股权15%！”“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励7000万超跑一辆！”“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励6.8亿别墅一座！”“恭喜BOSS送达外卖订单，奖励持续增值中商业街一条！”国际财经专栏约访：请问叶先生，以你如此雄厚的资产，为什么还要去送外卖，是在体验生活吗？叶天南：“勤劳才能致富！”国际财经专栏：说的好有道理，我竟无言以对！观众：叶天南都这么勤奋，我有什么理由偷懒？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/3b59e31402a1b82fdf82d0b869676b91","author":"东土唐长老","author_id":"","book_id":"682586588300968244
